props.name: children
props.description: Contents of the collapsible section

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Initial open state

props.name: isOpen
props.description: True if not collapsed

props.name: label
props.description: Text displayed in the header

props.name: onToggleOpen
props.description: Callback run when the open state changes

props.name: imageUrl
props.description: Image URL

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the circle container

props.name: username
props.description: Provide to use it as alt of the image for better a11y

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether the checkbox is checked

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Whether the checkbox is in an indeterminate state

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the checkbox

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name for the trigger button.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: `aria-labelledby` for the trigger button.

props.name: className
props.description: Class name applied to the trigger button.

props.name: disabled
props.description:
Disable the picker. The trigger button is not interactive and the
popover cannot be opened.

props.name: id
props.description: `id` attribute applied to the trigger button.

props.name: inputSize
props.description: Size variant of the trigger input.

props.name: maxDate
props.description: The latest selectable date (inclusive).

props.name: minDate
props.description: The earliest selectable date (inclusive).

props.name: onChange
props.description:
Callback fired when the selected value changes.

- `default` -> the selected `Date` or `null` when cleared
- `range`   -> `[from, to]` once both dates are selected, otherwise `null`
- `multiple`-> the array of selected `Date`s (empty array allowed)

props.name: readOnly
props.description:
Render the picker as read-only. The trigger displays the current value
but the popover cannot be opened.

props.name: endAdornment
props.description: Element displayed at the end of the input field.

props.name: error
props.description: Renders the input in an error state.

props.name: size
props.description:
Specifies the size of the input field.
Can be 'small', 'medium', or 'large'.

props.name: startAdornment
props.description: Element displayed at the start of the input field.

props.name: children
props.description:
The trigger element that will open the menu when clicked.
This element will be wrapped in a button with appropriate ARIA attributes.

props.name: items
props.description:
Array of menu items to be rendered in the menu.
Each item can be either a regular menu item or a separator.

props.name: offset
props.description: Distance between a popup and the trigger element

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description:
Callback fired when the component requests to be opened or closed.
Receives the next open state and the native event that triggered the
change (if any).

props.name: open
props.description:
Controls whether the menu is open or closed.
When omitted, the menu's open state will be managed internally
and toggled by clicking on the `children` trigger element.

props.name: placement
props.description:
The preferred placement of the menu relative to its trigger element.
Uses Floating UI placement options.

props.name: size
props.description: Size variant for the menu items.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to be displayed in the modal body

props.name: footer
props.description: Content to be displayed in the modal footer

props.name: footerVariant
props.description: Variant of the footer styling

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback function called when the modal is closed

props.name: open
props.description: Controls the visibility of the modal

props.name: size
props.description: Size variant of the modal

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Optional subtitle displayed below the title

props.name: title
props.description: Title displayed in the modal header

props.name: size
props.description: Size variant of the nav button.

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether the radio button is checked

props.name: name
props.description: The name of the radio button group

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when the radio button state changes

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the radio button

props.name: value
props.description: The value of the radio button

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Must not be used in controlled mode.

props.name: shape
props.description:
Controls the shape of the SegmentPicker and its items.
(default) - Items stretch to fill the container equally.
'circle' - Items fit tightly around their content to maintain a circular shape.
Only supported when items contain icons only.

props.name: size
props.description: Size variant of the SegmentPicker and its items.

props.name: value
props.description: The currently selected value (controlled mode).

props.name: className
props.description: Custom class name for the component.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default value of the select when uncontrolled.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the select is disabled.

props.name: error
props.description: Whether the select has an error

props.name: items
props.description: List of items to display in the select dropdown

props.name: name
props.description: Identifies the field when a form is submitted.

props.name: onChange
props.type: (event: SyntheticEvent | Event | null, value: SelectValueType) => void
props.description: Callback fired when the value of the select changes.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the select input

props.name: required
props.description: Whether the user must choose a value before submitting a form.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the select input

props.name: value
props.description: The controlled value of the select.

props.name: buttonLabel
props.description: Label for the action button

props.name: close
props.description: Whether to show the close button

props.name: onButtonClick
props.description: Callback fired when the action button is clicked

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback fired when the snackbar is closed

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Optional secondary message displayed below the title

props.name: title
props.description: Main message displayed in the snackbar

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant of the snackbar

props.name: className
props.description: Custom class name for the component.

props.name: status
props.description: The validation status to display.

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether the switch is checked or not

props.name: className
props.description: Custom class name for the switch component

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the switch is disabled

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback function when the switch state changes

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the switch component

props.name: styles
props.description: Custom styles to apply to the switch

props.name: thumbChildren
props.description: Custom content for the thumb of the switch

props.name: trackChildren
props.description: Custom content for the track of the switch

props.name: className
props.description: Custom class name for the textarea

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initial value of the textarea

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the textarea is disabled

props.name: error
props.description: Whether the textarea has an error

props.name: maxRows
props.description: Maximum number of rows the textarea can expand to

props.name: minRows
props.description: Minimum number of rows the textarea can expand to

props.name: onBlur
props.description:
Function called when the input loses focus.
The event parameter may be undefined.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback function to handle change in textarea value

props.name: onClick
props.description: Callback function to handle click

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the textarea

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the textarea

props.name: spellCheck
props.description: Enables or disables browser spell checking

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value of the textarea

props.name: children
props.description: Tooltip reference element.

props.name: initialOpen
props.description: If true, the component is shown at initial

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Callback fired when the component requests to be open.

props.name: open
props.description: If true, the component is shown.

props.name: placement
props.description: Tooltip placement.

props.name: state
props.description: The visual state of the edge. Determines base styles like `strokeWidth`.

props.name: type
props.description:
Determines the layout style for the EdgeLabel based on its content:

text: Simple text label.
icon: Single icon without additional content.
compound: Mixed content like icons + text, multiple icons, etc.
